_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
author: brad@saintyfx.com
description: On RuneScape’s forgotten continent of Ashenfall, dragons have awoken. Gather, build, skill and craft to survive in this co-operative survival crafting game.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# SteamCMD Base Installation Script

apt -y update
apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates

# Variables
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "Using anonymous Steam login"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
fi

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz

tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

export HOME=/mnt/server

# Install server
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} validate +quit

# Fix steam libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

# Permissions for Sentry Crash Handler
chmod +x /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Plugins/Developer/Sentry/Binaries/Linux/crashpad_handler 2>/dev/null || true

# Seed DedicatedServer.ini
mkdir -p /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/LinuxServer
cat <<'EOF' > /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/LinuxServer/DedicatedServer.ini
[SectionsToSave]
bCanSaveAllSections=true

[/Script/Dominion.DedicatedServerSettings]
AdminPassword=
OwnerId=
WorldPassword=
ServerName=
DefaultWorldName=
ServerGuid=
EOF

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed"
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Owner ID
variables.description: Your RuneScape: Dragonwilds Player ID (Required for server startup)

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: The password used to access server management in-game

variables.name: Default World Name
variables.description: The name of the world to create/load

variables.name: World Password
variables.description: Optional world password. Leave empty for public access.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Enable automatic updates on server startup

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for Dragonwilds server
